fact_nuggets.text: Electric Surge (Japanese: Electric Maker) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature Ability of Tapu Koko. In Generation IX, it is the signature Ability of Pincurchin.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Electric Surge enters the battle, it creates the effect of the move Electric Terrain on the battlefield. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Electric Surge has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Electric Surge enters the battle, it creates the effect of the move Electric Terrain on the battlefield.
When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.
